shared_attributes.movement: right to left scrolling at Current_Speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump, wider than small variant
context.screen_position: spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Common obstacle, appears from game start, requires same jump height as small but wider hitbox

visual_specification.shape: Two vertical desert cacti placed side-by-side forming a group
visual_specification.details: Two cacti with similar height (70px), placed close together, each with spiky arms, combined width 68px

relationships.shared_with: Same height as cactus_small (70px), same visual style
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34px wide (single cactus), cactus_large is 102x100px (3 cacti, taller)

explicit_negations: no animation or movement beyond scrolling
no gaps between the two cacti (solid group)
